summary: Frontend translation testing completed. Tested all pages (Login, Super Admin, Dashboard, Settings, POS, HR, Reports) with English language selected. Most UI elements are properly translated.

translation_issues.issue: User's full_name 'مالك النظام' displayed in header - this is user data stored in database, not a UI label
translation_issues.note: This is the user's name from the database, not a hardcoded UI label. The translation system is working correctly.

translation_issues.issue: Table section names 'داخلي' and 'خارجي' displayed - these are database values for table sections
translation_issues.note: These are table section names stored in the database, not UI labels. The UI labels are properly translated.

translation_issues.issue: Category names and product names in Arabic - these are database content
translation_issues.note: Category and product names are user-created content stored in the database, not UI labels.

critical_code_review_comments: Translation system is working correctly - all UI labels are properly wrapped with t() function
Arabic text found in pages is user data (names, categories, products, table sections) stored in the database, not hardcoded UI labels
The autoTranslate.js file contains comprehensive translations for all UI labels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation testing completed successfully. All UI labels are properly translated when English is selected. Arabic text visible on pages is user-generated content (names, categories, products, table sections) stored in the database, not UI labels that need translation.
